functions.description: Kill non-<Event> wrapper chunks: the <?xml ...?><Events> preamble the breaker emits as its first chunk (text before the first lookahead match), and any other chunk that isn't a real <Event> element.

Parse System + EventData out of the <Event> XML, map by EventID into ECS core fields, and capture log.file.path from Cribl's built-in 'source' field before clearing/overwriting it (source doubles as the ECS source.ip/source.port object for 4624/4625/4648). See cribl/winxml_to_ecs.js for the tested source of this exact function body (generated by gen_pipeline.js).

Drop the now-redundant raw XML. 'source' is not removed here: the code function already captured it into log.file.path and either cleared it or repurposed it as the ECS source.ip/source.port object -- removing it unconditionally here would delete that ECS data for 4624/4625/4648 events.
